tts_text: It's easy to fall out of routine on holidays.
display_sentence: It's easy to fall out of routine on holidays.

tts_text: I wake up early to get a head start.
display_sentence: I wake up early to get a head start.

sentence_ko: 저는 집중 작업을 위해 시간을 따로 떼어 둬요.
tts_text: I block out time for deep work.
display_sentence: I block out time for deep work.

sentence_ko: 매일 아침 저는 할 일의 우선순위를 정해요.
tts_text: Each morning I prioritize my tasks.
display_sentence: Each morning I prioritize my tasks.

sentence_ko: 저는 매일 저녁 잠시 전자기기를 멀리하려 해요.
tts_text: I try to unplug for a bit every evening.
display_sentence: I try to unplug for a bit every evening.

sentence_ko: 저는 주말 동안 재충전하는 걸 좋아해요.
tts_text: I like to recharge over the weekend.
display_sentence: I like to recharge over the weekend.

sentence_ko: 저는 충분히 누릴 자격이 있는 휴식을 즐기고 있어요.
tts_text: I'm enjoying a well-earned rest.
display_sentence: I'm enjoying a well-earned rest.

sentence_ko: 가끔은 그냥 처음부터 다시 시작할 필요가 있어요.
tts_text: Sometimes I just need to hit the reset button.
display_sentence: Sometimes I just need to hit the reset button.

sentence_en: I try to ___ throughout the day.
sentence_ko: 저는 하루 종일 일정한 속도를 유지하려 해요.
tts_text: I try to keep a steady pace throughout the day.
display_sentence: I try to keep a steady pace throughout the day.

tts_text: I'm trying to streamline my routine.
display_sentence: I'm trying to streamline my routine.

tts_text: I had a productive morning today.
display_sentence: I had a productive morning today.

sentence_ko: 집에서 저는 여러 가지 역할을 맡아요.
tts_text: At home I wear many hats.
display_sentence: At home I wear many hats.

sentence_ko: 저는 매일 여러 책임을 동시에 감당해야 해요.
tts_text: I have to juggle responsibilities every day.
display_sentence: I have to juggle responsibilities every day.

tts_text: It's hard to stay disciplined on weekends.
display_sentence: It's hard to stay disciplined on weekends.

sentence_en: I need to ___ on busy weeks.
sentence_ko: 바쁜 주에는 좀 속도를 늦출 필요가 있어요.
tts_text: I need to ease off the gas on busy weeks.
display_sentence: I need to ease off the gas on busy weeks.

sentence_ko: 제 리듬을 찾는 데 일주일이 걸려요.
tts_text: It takes a week to find my rhythm.
display_sentence: It takes a week to find my rhythm.

sentence_ko: 저는 매일 저만의 시간을 내려고 해요.
tts_text: I try to make time for myself each day.
